products.name: UAV Custom Propeller Design
products.descriptor: Custom UAV propeller engineering service matching planform, materials, and pitch for specific missions

evidence.snippet: Sensenich also custom designs UAV propellers for specific applications, matching propeller planform, materials, and pitch distribution to maximize mission endurance and performance. Please take a look at our [UAV propeller brochure](/wp-content/uploads/2018/01/Application_Guides_UAV_Propeller_Brochure_1322768982.pdf) for more information.

products.name: Carbon Fiber Aircraft Ground Adjustable Propellers
products.descriptor: Carbon fiber ground-adjustable propellers for light sport and experimental aircraft

evidence.snippet: We manufacture a complete line of aviation propellers. These include fixed pitch wood propellers for antique, light sport and experimental aircraft. Aluminum propellers for general aviation aircraft such as Cessna and Piper along with experimental aircraft such as Van’s RV and Glassairs. Composite ground adjustable propellers for light sport aircraft using Rotax, Jabiru, Continental and Lycoming engines.
